title: Change footer copyright/bottom bar text to white

requirements.summary: Change the text color of the bottom bar/copyright section in the footer component to white
acceptanceCriteria: The text in the 4th section/div of the footer (bottom bar, e.g. copyright bar) renders in white (#ffffff).
No other footer sections are affected by this change.
Change applies to both HoustonFooter.tsx and Footer.tsx if they share the same structure at that position.

file_operations.description: Modify the bottom bar div (the 4th child div inside the footer's inner container, corresponding to the copyright bar) to use text-white class instead of its current text color class. Locate the div that contains copyright text and ensure it has the text-white Tailwind class applied.

Modify the bottom bar div (the 4th child div inside the footer's inner container, corresponding to the copyright bar) to use text-white class instead of its current text color class. Locate the div that contains copyright or bottom section text and ensure it has the text-white Tailwind class applied.
